strengths: 20-year technical career with progression to Staff-level roles, demonstrating depth across multiple domains including infrastructure and platform work
Current position at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active engagement with modern AI technologies
Proven ability to inspire and mentor through open-source contributions (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and technical workshops
concerns: No demonstrated delivery of AI-powered products or platforms; recent AI experience is infrastructure-focused rather than customer-facing or business-impacting
No evidence of strategic customer advisory experience or executive-level partnerships, which is a core responsibility of the principal engineer role
No advanced degree in AI/ML; dual Bachelor's degrees show technical foundation but not specialized AI expertise expected for director-level role

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI product delivery
Absence of strategic customer advisory experience
Broad technical experience and documented mentorship ability

response.justification: Szabo brings 20 years of solid technical experience with recent exposure to AI infrastructure, but the principal engineer role demands strategic leadership with demonstrated AI product expertise and customer advisory capabilities. While his technical breadth, builder mentality, and mentorship track record are assets, the absence of shipped AI products, strategic customer partnerships, and executive-level engagement represents significant gaps. His profile fits a strong technical IC but lacks the strategic scope required for a director-level AI strategy role.
